hints.title: Hint 1 — DP Approach
hints.content: For each position `i`, the water level is `min(maxLeft[i], maxRight[i]) - height[i]`. Precompute prefix max from left and suffix max from right.

hints.title: Hint 2 — Two Pointers
hints.content: Maintain left and right pointers. If `height[left] < height[right]`, process `left` using `leftMax`; otherwise process `right` using `rightMax`. Move the shorter side inward.

hints.title: Hint 3 — Monotonic Stack
hints.content: Use a stack of indices. When you find a bar taller than the stack top, you've found a valley — calculate the water that would fill it.
